summary: Comprehensive testing of ALPHA DROP - Product Intelligence Engine completed successfully. All core features working including dashboard, product analytics, search/filters, alerts, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: Chart tab data-testids may be missing for Sales/Views/Creators tabs
data-testid attributes may be missing for individual hook and video items

Get products endpoint with 50 products returned
Dashboard products endpoint with 3 sections
Dashboard stats endpoint with correct counts
Product detail endpoint with full analytics
Alerts endpoint with 10 alerts
Categories endpoint with 12 categories
Product filtering by status and score
Refresh products endpoint
Dashboard loads with 3 sections (Explosive, Rising, Early Signals)
Stats bar displays correct product counts
Product cards show Alpha Score, status badges, price, sales, creator count
Navigation between Dashboard, Discover, Alerts pages
Beginner Mode toggle with explanations
Refresh Data button generates new products
Product card click navigates to detail page

Score breakdown displays 7 factors with progress bars
Market Validation shows cross-platform scores (TikTok, Amazon, Google)
Discover page search functionality
Status filter dropdown (Explosive, Rising, etc.)
Category filter dropdown
Score range slider (0-100)
Clear filters functionality
Alerts page shows alerts with severity badges
Mark alert as read functionality
View product button from alerts
Mobile responsive design
Mobile menu toggle and navigation
